nasb.text: Also, do not take seriously all words which are spoken, so that you will not hear your servant cursing you.

esv.text: Do not take to heart all the things that people say, lest you hear your servant cursing you.

cnv.text: 人所說的一切話，都不要放在心上，因你可能聽見僕人咒罵你。

ccb.text: 你不要斤斤计较别人所说的每一句话，免得听见你的仆人咒诅你，

csbs.text: 不要把人所说的每一句话都放在心上，这样你就不会听到你的奴仆诅咒你；
